top_signals.title: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money
top_signals.summary: The FCA’s vision for agentic AI points toward a financial system where programmable money and tokenized assets could play a much larger role.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Broadcom, Apple Extend Chips Partnership to 2031
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Mark Gurman said that despite ups and downs for Apple and Broadcom's partnership to build out AI servers is expected to last for multiple generations of Apple products. Gurman said that relationship is mutually beneficial as Apple needed Broadcom to help build out the technology and Apple remains Broadcom's biggest growth driver and revenue source.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: North America Drove Nearly Half Of Global Emissions Growth In 2025
top_signals.summary: The Energy Institute has released the 2026 Statistical Review of World Energy, published in partnership with Ember and in collaboration with KPMG and Kearney. The Statistical Review was previously published for more than 70 years by BP, and it remains one of the most useful annual references for understanding the global energy system. The full report and data can be found at this link. Over the next month, I will dig into the major categories in the report, including oil, natural gas, coal, renewables, electricity, and carbon dioxide emissions.…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: President Trump’s strategic bitcoin reserve hits a legal and jurisdictional snag: Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: President Trump's plans for a strategic bitcoin reserve are hitting a legal and jurisdictional snag, according to reporting from Bloomberg.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
